text: The glass and modernity of the hallway seem cold and impersonal at first, but upon entering the exhibit space marked R+D, I feel a subtle shift—curiosity blends with calm as I read poetic fragments about sunlight, tranquility, and surrender. This space is devoted to creativity and research, and I feel a quiet resonance with those intentional acts of discovery. The interplay of human touch and innovation is almost palpable. I sense a gentle awe at how spaces like this invite thoughtful participation in the ongoing narrative of progress.
